name: Apricot Bites
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill
Preparation Time: 1:20
Grease an 8-inch square baking dish with margarine.
1. Place apricots and 1 cup water into a saucepan. Bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer for 10-15 minutes until apricots are tender. Drain and let cool.
2. Fit the steel knife blade into the work bowl of a food processor. Combine margarine, granulated sugar, and 1 cup flour in the work bowl. Process until smooth. Spread into the bottom of the prepared baking dish. Bake for 25 minutes at 350 degrees.
3. With the steel knife still attached, process drained apricots until chopped into 1/4-inch pieces. Add 1/3 cup flour, baking powder, brown sugar, eggs, and vanilla. Process until mixed well, about 6-8 seconds.
4. Remove the crust from the oven, spread the apricot mixture evenly over the baked crust, and return to the oven for 30 minutes longer.
5. Let cool, then cut into 2-inch squares.
Yield: 16 two-inch squares.
